seo_title: The Sundune | Coastal Desert Retreat in Palm Springs | 3 King Beds
seo_description: The Sundune is a coastal-inspired desert condo in Palm Springs with 3 KING beds and walkable downtown location. Fresh, nostalgic, and effortlessly Palm Springs — just minutes from The Surf Club. Book direct, save 15%.
description_heading: Coastal Desert Ease. Three KING Beds.
description_p1: The Sundune at Palm Springs is a coastal-inspired desert hideaway with 3 KING beds where ease meets exploration — fresh, nostalgic, and effortlessly Palm Springs — just minutes from both The Surf Club and the heart of downtown. The kind of place most people stop looking once they find it.
description_p2: The design runs on a coastal-desert frequency: a design-forward beach bungalow — without cliché coastal décor. Sun-bleached textures, natural materials, a palette that pulls from surf and sand. Real retro personality. Copper and cool aloe. Early-morning light through linen curtains. The feeling of a weekend that actually slows down. Not trendy. Not trying too hard. Just good design that makes you want to stay in.
description_p3: Three full king beds means three couples can share without anyone drawing straws over who gets the pull-out. Full kitchen, and a living room that doesn't make you feel like you're camping. Walk out the door and you're in it — Palm Canyon Drive, coffee, galleries, restaurants, all on foot. This is the version of Palm Springs that regulars come back to.
description_p4: The Sundune is nostalgic in the right way — it doesn't recreate a specific decade, it captures a feeling. A basecamp for those ready to hang up their surfboard, sleep in a little longer, and head out inspired. Long summers. Road trips. Salt air. The kind of vacation where you lose track of the date and consider staying an extra night because leaving feels wrong. Wanderlust, active — and also very cocktail chill.
